attributes.Sql Query:
select 
GENERATION_2_CD,
GEN2_PROPERTY_CD ,
GEN2_SORT_CD,
GENERATION_3_CD ,
GEN3_ALIAS_CD ,
GEN3_PROPERTY_CD ,
GENERATION_4_CD ,
GEN4_ALIAS_CD,
GEN4_PROPERTY_CD ,
GENERATION_5_CD ,
GEN5_ALIAS_CD ,
GEN5_PROPERTY_CD ,
GENERATION_6_CD ,
GEN6_ALIAS_CD ,
GEN6_PROPERTY_CD ,
GENERATION_7_CD,
GEN7_ALIAS_CD,
GEN7_PROPERTY_CD ,
GENERATION_8_CD,
GENERATION_9_CD ,
GENERATION_10_CD
from
$$STGDB.WI_MT_EIS_GEN_ACCOUNT a
where not exists 
(  
select 1 from  $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EIS_GEN_ACCOUNT MTGA
where
coalesce( a.GENERATION_2_CD ,'U')     = coalesce( MTGA.GENERATION_2_CD ,'U') 
and coalesce( a.GEN2_PROPERTY_CD   ,'U')     =    coalesce( MTGA.GEN2_PROPERTY_CD   ,'U') 
and coalesce( a.GEN2_SORT_CD     ,'U')      =   coalesce( MTGA.GEN2_SORT_CD     ,'U')
and coalesce( a.GENERATION_3_CD,'U')     =  coalesce( MTGA.GENERATION_3_CD,'U') 
and coalesce( a.GEN3_ALIAS_CD      ,'U')      =     coalesce( MTGA.GEN3_ALIAS_CD      ,'U')  
and coalesce( a.GEN3_PROPERTY_CD,'U')  =     coalesce( MTGA.GEN3_PROPERTY_CD,'U')     
and coalesce( a.GENERATION_4_CD  ,'U')  =      coalesce( MTGA.GENERATION_4_CD  ,'U')      
and coalesce( a.GEN4_PROPERTY_CD,'U') =      coalesce( MTGA.GEN4_PROPERTY_CD,'U')  
and coalesce( a.GENERATION_5_CD      ,'U')     = coalesce( MTGA.GENERATION_5_CD      ,'U')    
and coalesce( a.GEN5_ALIAS_CD ,'U')  =  coalesce( MTGA.GEN5_ALIAS_CD ,'U')  
and coalesce( a.GEN5_PROPERTY_CD    ,'U')   =  coalesce( MTGA.GEN5_PROPERTY_CD    ,'U')   
and coalesce( a.GENERATION_6_CD   ,'U')= coalesce( MTGA.GENERATION_6_CD   ,'U')  
and coalesce( a.GEN6_ALIAS_CD     ,'U')    =     coalesce( MTGA.GEN6_ALIAS_CD     ,'U')  
and coalesce( a.GEN6_PROPERTY_CD  ,'U')    =     coalesce( MTGA.GEN6_PROPERTY_CD  ,'U')   
and coalesce( a.GEN7_ALIAS_CD ,'U') = coalesce( MTGA.GEN7_ALIAS_CD ,'U')
and coalesce( a.GEN7_PROPERTY_CD,'U')     = coalesce( MTGA.GEN7_PROPERTY_CD,'U') 
and coalesce( a.GENERATION_8_CD  ,'U')= coalesce( MTGA.GENERATION_8_CD  ,'U')   
and coalesce( a.GENERATION_9_CD  ,'U')= coalesce( MTGA.GENERATION_9_CD  ,'U')
and coalesce( a.GENERATION_10_CD  ,'U')      = coalesce( MTGA.GENERATION_10_CD  ,'U') 
and coalesce( a.GEN4_ALIAS_CD,'U')      = coalesce( MTGA.GEN4_ALIAS_CD  ,'U') 
and coalesce( a.GENERATION_7_CD  ,'U')      = coalesce( MTGA.GENERATION_7_CD  ,'U') 
)

SELECT
 BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,node_level01_ID
,node_level02_ID
,node_level03_ID
,node_level04_ID
,node_level05_ID
,Null As node_level06_ID
,Null As node_level07_ID
,Null As node_level08_ID
,Null As node_level09_ID
,Null As node_level10_ID
,Null As node_level11_ID
,Null As node_level12_ID
,Null As node_level13_ID
,Null As node_level14_ID
,Null As node_level15_ID
FROM
(
Select	
Coalesce(level05.account_group_id ,level04.account_group_id 
,level03.account_group_id ,level02.account_group_id 
,level01.account_group_id 
) As Financial_account_group_id
,nfatv.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE 
,level01.account_group_id As node_level01_ID
,level02.account_group_id As node_level02_ID
,level03.account_group_id As node_level03_ID
,level04.account_group_id As node_level04_ID
,level05.account_group_id As node_level05_ID

From
(
Select	*
From	$$finlglvwdb.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 1
) level01
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$finlglvwdb.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 2
) level02
	On	level01.account_group_id = level02.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$finlglvwdb.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 3
) level03
	On	level02.account_group_id = level03.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$finlglvwdb.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 4
) level04
	On	level03.account_group_id = level04.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$finlglvwdb.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 5
) level05
	On	level04.account_group_id = level05.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Inner Join
	$$finlglvwdb.n_financial_account  nfatv
	On	Financial_account_group_id = nfatv.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
) A
where not exists 
(select 1 from $$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY RAH
			where RAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE= A.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE )

SELECT 
CAST('Expense' AS VARCHAR(20)) GENERATION_2_CD,
'+' GEN2_PROPERTY_CD ,
'1' GEN2_SORT_CD,

case when EXCLUDE_IT_ALLOCATIONS_FLG ='Y' 
then  cast('Centralized Allocations' as VARCHAR(50)) else cast('Expense Excluding Centralized Allocations' as VARCHAR(50))
  end as  GENERATION_3_CD ,
CAST('' as varchar(90)) GEN3_ALIAS_CD ,
'+' GEN3_PROPERTY_CD ,

case when NFA.EXCLUDE_IT_ALLOCATIONS_FLG='Y' then CAST('IT  Allocations' AS VARCHAR(50))
 else CAST(RFAH.LEVEL04_ACCT_GROUP_ID AS VARCHAR(50)) end as GENERATION_4_CD ,
CAST('' as varchar(90)) GEN4_ALIAS_CD , /* New column added in Q1FY11 for IT Allocation Proj */
'+' GEN4_PROPERTY_CD ,

case when NFA.EXCLUDE_IT_ALLOCATIONS_FLG='Y' then CAST('IT Allocation Accounts' AS VARCHAR(50)) 
  else CAST(RFAH.LEVEL05_ACCT_GROUP_ID AS VARCHAR(50)) end as  GENERATION_5_CD ,
CAST('' as varchar(90))GEN5_ALIAS_CD,
'+' GEN5_PROPERTY_CD ,

CAST('A-'||NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS VARCHAR(50)) GENERATION_6_CD ,
CAST(NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ||'-'|| NFA.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION AS VARCHAR(90)) GEN6_ALIAS_CD ,
'+' GEN6_PROPERTY_CD ,

cast('A-'||NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ||'-'||NFB.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE AS VARCHAR(50)) GENERATION_7_CD , /* New column added in Q1FY11 for IT Allocation Proj */
CAST (NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ||'-'||NFB.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE || '-'||CASE WHEN NFB.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE = '000' THEN 
'Unspecified' ELSE COALESCE(NFB.SUBACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,'Unspecified') END AS VARCHAR(90)) GEN7_ALIAS_CD ,
'+' GEN7_PROPERTY_CD ,

/*
CAST(NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ||'-'||NFB.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE AS VARCHAR(90)) GEN7_ALIAS_CD ,
'+' GEN7_PROPERTY_CD ,*/

NFA.FINANCIAL_ACCT_DISPLAY_SEQ_INT GENERATION_8_CD,

NFB.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE GENERATION_9_CD ,

NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE GENERATION_10_CD 

FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT NFA,
(
SELECT 
 NFSA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
 NFSA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE, 
 NFSA.SUBACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION 
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SUBACCOUNT_TV NFSA 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY NFSA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,NFSA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
ORDER BY   NFSA.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
where  NFSA.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' ) NFB,
$$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY RFAH 
WHERE NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = NFB.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE 
AND NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE =RFAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
AND RFAH.LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID = 'Expense'
AND RFAH.LEVEL04_ACCT_GROUP_ID <> 'Non Expense SSOT Other'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
CAST('Asset Additions' AS VARCHAR(20)) GENERATION_2_CD ,
'+' GEN2_PROPERTY_CD ,
'2' GEN2_SORT_CD ,
RFAH.LEVEL04_ACCT_GROUP_ID GENERATION_3_CD ,
'' GEN3_ALIAS_CD ,
'+' GEN3_PROPERTY_CD ,
RFAH.LEVEL05_ACCT_GROUP_ID GENERATION_4_CD ,
'' GEN4_ALIAS_CD, /*  New column */
'+' GEN4_PROPERTY_CD ,
'A-'||NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE GENERATION_5_CD ,
NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ||'-'|| NFA.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION GEN5_ALIAS_CD ,
'+' GEN5_PROPERTY_CD ,
'A-'||NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ||'-'||NFB.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE GENERATION_6_CD ,
CAST (NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ||'-'||NFB.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE || '-'||CASE WHEN NFB.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE = '000' 
THEN 'Unspecified' ELSE COALESCE(NFB.SUBACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,'Unspecified') END AS VARCHAR(60)) GEN6_ALIAS_CD ,
'+' GEN6_PROPERTY_CD ,
'' GENERATION_7_CD, /* New Column  */
/*NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ||'-'||NFB.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE */''  GEN7_ALIAS_CD ,
/*'+' */ '' GEN7_PROPERTY_CD ,
NFA.FINANCIAL_ACCT_DISPLAY_SEQ_INT GENERATION_8_CD ,
NFB.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE GENERATION_9_CD ,
NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE GENERATION_10_CD 
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT NFA,
(
 SELECT 
 NFSA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
 NFSA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE, 
 NFSA.SUBACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION 
FROM 
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SUBACCOUNT_TV NFSA 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY NFSA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,NFSA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
ORDER BY NFSA.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
where  NFSA.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01') NFB,
$$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY RFAH 
WHERE 1=1
AND NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = NFB.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE 
AND NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE =RFAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
AND RFAH.LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID = 'Asset'
AND RFAH.LEVEL04_ACCT_GROUP_ID <> 'Unmapped Asset'
UNION ALL
SELECT
'Headcount' GENERATION_2_CD
,'~' GEN2_PROPERTY_CD
,'3' GEN2_SORT_CD
,A.BK_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD GENERATION_3_CD
,'' GEN3_ALIAS_CD
,'~' GEN3_PROPERTY_CD
,B.BK_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD GENERATION_4_CD
,'' GEN4_ALIAS_CD /*  New column */
,'~' GEN4_PROPERTY_CD
,C.BK_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD GENERATION_5_CD
,C.HR_EVENT_LOGIC_NAME GEN5_ALIAS_CD
,'~' GEN5_PROPERTY_CD
,D.BK_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD GENERATION_6_CD
,D.HR_EVENT_LOGIC_NAME GEN6_ALIAS_CD
,'~' GEN6_PROPERTY_CD
,'' GENERATION_7_CD /* New Column */
,/* C.BK_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD */ '' GEN7
,'' GEN7_PROPERTY_CD
,C.HR_EVENT_LOGIC_DISPLAY_SEQ_INT GENERATION_8_CD
,'' GENERATION_9_CD
,C.BK_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD GENERATION_10_CD
FROM
(SEL *FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_HR_EVENT_LOGIC WHERE RU_PARENT_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD IS NULL) A
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_HR_EVENT_LOGIC B
ON
A.BK_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD =B.RU_PARENT_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.N_HR_EVENT_LOGIC C
ON
B.BK_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD =C.RU_PARENT_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.N_HR_EVENT_LOGIC D
ON
C.BK_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD =D.RU_PARENT_HR_EVENT_LOGIC_CD
UNION ALL
SELECT 
'Exchange Rates' GENERATION_2_CD,
'~' GEN2_PROPERTY_CD,
'4' GEN2_SORT_CD,
'Func_Rate' GENERATION_3_CD,
'' GEN3_ALIAS_CD,
'~' GEN3_PROPERTY_CD,
'' GENERATION_4_CD,
'' GEN4_ALIAS_CD, /* New column */
'' GEN4_PROPERTY_CD,
'' GENERATION_5_CD,
'' GEN5_ALIAS_CD,
'' GEN5_PROPERTY_CD,
'' GENERATION_6_CD,
'' GEN6_ALIAS_CD,
'' GEN6_PROPERTY_CD,
'' GENERATION_7_CD, /* New Column */
'' GEN7,
'' GEN7_PROPERTY_CD,
4 GENERATION_8_CD,
'' GENERATION_9_CD,
'' GENERATION_10_CD
FROM 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL
WHERE DUMMY = 'DUMMY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
'Exchange Rates' GENERATION_2_CD,
'~' GEN2_PROPERTY_CD,
'5' GEN2_SORT_CD,
NGL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE GENERATION_3_CD,
NGL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE||' - '||NIC.ISO_CURRENCY_NAME GEN3_ALIAS_CD,
'~' GEN3_PROPERTY_CD,
'' GENERATION_4_CD,
'' GEN4_ALIAS_CD, /* New column */
'' GEN4_PROPERTY_CD,
'' GENERATION_5_CD,
'' GEN5_ALIAS_CD,
'' GEN5_PROPERTY_CD,
'' GENERATION_6_CD,
'' GEN6_ALIAS_CD,
'' GEN6_PROPERTY_CD,
'' GENERATION_7_CD, /* New Column */
'' GEN7,
'' GEN7_PROPERTY_CD,
5 GE8,
'' GENERATION_9_CD,
'' GENERATION_10_CD
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_TV NGL,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC
WHERE 1=1
AND NGL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE = NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
AND NIC.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
GROUP BY 
NGL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE, 
NGL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE||' - '||NIC.ISO_CURRENCY_NAME
